```markdown
# California Trip — May 2026

**Dates:** May 19–27, 2026 (8 nights)
**Destination:** Long Beach, CA (LGB) → staying at Andrea's parents, Huntington Beach
**Party:** Dan, Andrea, Grayson (4), Emma (~10 months, lap child)

## ✈️ Flights (Southwest)
| Leg | Flight | Date | Departs | Arrives |
|-----|--------|------|---------|---------|
| STL → Chicago Midway | WN 826 | Tue May 19 | 1:45 PM CDT | 2:55 PM CDT |
| Chicago Midway → Long Beach | WN 4260 | Tue May 19 | 4:30 PM CDT | 8:50 PM PDT |
| Long Beach → Phoenix | WN 4128 | Wed May 27 | 12:40 PM PDT | ~2:00 PM MST |
| Phoenix → St. Louis | WN 2906 | Wed May 27 | 4:20 PM MST | 9:10 PM CDT |

## 🐕 Blue Boarding (May 19–27)
- All vaccinations current through 2027 ✅
- Priority order: Dan's parents → Kenny → Gail
- [ ] Confirm with Dan's parents

## 👶 Kids Logistics
- Emma = lap child (Southwest, free, add at 24hr check-in May 18)
- Pack: pack-n-play, white noise, blackout cover, sleep sack, monitor
- Confirm sleeping space for Emma at Huntington Beach

## 🎟️ Disneyland
- [ ] Book tickets in advance — reservations required for May
- ~30 min from Huntington Beach

## Open Items
- [ ] Confirm Blue boarding with Dan's parents
- [ ] Confirm pickup + sleeping arrangements with Andrea's parents (arrive ~8:50pm May 19)
- [ ] Book Disneyland tickets (do ASAP — required reservations)
- [ ] Add Emma as lap infant at 24hr check-in (May 18)
- [ ] Give Blue flea/tick + heartworm before drop-off
- [ ] Rental car — confirm if needed (Andrea's parents transporting)
```

```markdown
# FIFA World Cup 2026 — Quarterfinal Ticket

**Match:** M100 — Kansas City Quarterfinal
**Date:** Saturday, July 11, 2026
**Category:** 2 | **Edition:** #22
**Most likely matchup:** Argentina vs Portugal
**Private key:** `~/.openclaw/secrets/fifa.key`

## How to Convert RTT → Real Ticket
1. **Hold collectible** — do NOT burn early
2. **Watch for FIFA conversion window** — May/June 2026
3. When window opens: choose to convert, assign ticket to an email (⚠️ IRREVERSIBLE)
4. Burn collectible → receive ticket in FIFA app

> ⚠️ Miss the window = lose the right to convert
> ⚠️ Cannot enter the venue with the collectible — it's only the claim check

## Open Items
- [ ] Watch for FIFA conversion window announcement (May/June 2026)
- [ ] Convert RTT → real ticket when window opens
- [ ] Assign ticket to correct email before burning
```

```markdown
**Plan received:** 2026-04-04
**Emma's age:** 8 months
**Method:** Gentle, responsive — no cry-it-out
**Pediatrician:** ✅ Cleared to drop night feeds + increase daytime calories

## Daytime Schedule (6–9 Months)
| Time | Activity |
|------|----------|
| 7:00 AM | Wake up |
| 7:05 AM | Bottle #1 |
| 8:30 AM | Breakfast |
| 9:15 AM | Bottle #2 |
| 9:45–11:15 AM | Nap 1 (1.5 hrs) |
| 11:20 AM | Bottle #3 |
| 12:30 PM | Lunch |
| 1:45 PM | Bottle #4 |
| 2:15–3:45 PM | Nap 2 (1.5 hrs) |
| 3:50 PM | Bottle #5 |
| 6:00 PM | Dinner |
| 6:30 PM | Bottle #6 |
| 7:00 PM | Bedtime |

**Switch to 9–12 month schedule when Emma turns 9 months (July 22, 2026)**
```

```markdown
# 2025 Tax Filing Reference

**Status:** ✅ Filed + signed 2026-04-15
**Accountant:** David Ellis — Elias Mortland & Company
**Contact:** holly@ems-accounting.com
**Filing status:** Married Filing Jointly

## Key Items
- **Emma:** Added as new dependent (DOB 7/22/2025, SSN obtained 2026-04-01)
- **Form 5695:** Energy credit ~$4,575 (30% of $15,248.61)
  - EcoFlow DELTA Pro Ultra X: $500 + $9,899 (Nov 2025)
  - EcoFlow Smart Extra Battery (Refurb): $1,499 (Aug 2025)
  - Brighton Electric installation: $3,350.61 (Dec 2025)
- **RSU/ESPP:** E*Trade (not Fidelity) — cost basis adjustments flagged
- **Rental:** Schedule E — depreciation carry-forward with David Ellis
- **HSA:** Both Dan (Optum) and Andrea (unknown provider) included

## Documents (all in Google Drive /2025/)
- W-2: Dan (Salesforce) + Andrea (Purina)
- 1099-CONS: E*Trade RSU/ESPP
- 1099-B: Webull
- 1099-SA + 5498-SA: Dan (Optum + HealthEquity) + Andrea
- FSA Dependent Care: Andrea
- 1098: Primary mortgage (BoA) + Rental mortgage (Guild)
- Property tax: Real estate + personal property (St. Louis County)
- Charitable donations
- 1099-INT: interest income
- EcoFlow receipts + Brighton Electric invoice (Form 5695)

## Post-Filing To-Dos
- [ ] HSA consolidation: transfer HealthEquity → Optum (unblocked)
- [ ] Pull filed return docs + compare to what was submitted
- [ ] 2026 Schedule E: log DNI HOA payment ($1,640.99 paid 2026-03-27)

- [ ] Next year: get Andrea's HSA provider name
```

### → 50-Resources/Peptide Protocol Reference.md

```markdown
---
type: reference
status: active
created: 2026-04-18
updated: 2026-04-18
tags: [fitness, peptides, health, reference]
---

# Peptide Protocol Reference

> Personal tracking only. Not medical advice.

## Active Stack (as of April 2026)

| Peptide | Status | Schedule | Dose | On Hand |
|---------|--------|----------|------|---------|
| KLOW Blend (BPC-157 + TB-500 + GHK-Cu + KPV) | ✅ Active | Mon–Fri | 15u | 20 vials |
| NAD+ | ✅ Active | Mon/Wed/Fri | 100mg (60u) | ~9 vials (500mg) |
| Retatrutide | ✅ Active | Monday only | 1mg (4u) | 10 vials (50mg) |

## KLOW Blend
- **Vial:** 80mg total (GHK-Cu 50mg + BPC-157 10mg + TB-500 10mg + KPV 10mg)
- **Reconstitution:** 3.0mL BAC water → 26.6 mg/mL
- **Draw:** 15u (sub-Q, abdomen/thigh/upper arm, rotate sites)
- **Source:** Paramount Peptides — code BHGUIDE

## NAD+
- **Reconstitution:** 500mg/3.0mL BAC water → 166.7 mg/mL
- **Draw:** 60u = 100mg | Target: titrate to 150mg
- **Schedule:** Mon/Wed/Fri, morning preferred

## Retatrutide
- **Reconstitution:** 50mg/2.0mL BAC water → 25 mg/mL
- **Titration:** 1mg (4u) × 4 weeks → 2mg → 4mg → 6mg → 8mg
- **Week 1 started:** 2026-03-29

## Weekly Schedule
| Day | KLOW | NAD+ | Reta |
|-----|------|------|------|
| Mon | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ 1mg |
| Tue | ✅ | — | — |
| Wed | ✅ | ✅ | — |
| Thu | ✅ | — | — |
| Fri | ✅ | ✅ | — |
| Sat | ❌ | — | — |
| Sun | ❌ | — | — |

## Supplies
- ✅ BAC water, insulin syringes (31g 8mm × 200), alcohol pads, reconstitution syringes
- [ ] **Order sharps container (Amazon)**

## References
- https://biohackingplayground.com/ (calculators)
- https://peptidedosages.com/ (guides)
```
